remaining_tasks.name: Push branch and open PR for v1.7 milestone planning (after PR 589 merges, OR open separate planning PR now)

decisions.decision: Branch feat/v1.7-launch-readiness-planning was created off feat/launch-readiness-instrumentation, not off main
decisions.rationale: Resume memory explicitly offered 'off current' as an option; main does not yet have Stage 1 instrumentation that v1.7 phases reference

decisions.decision: All four v1.7 phases (41-44) were defined as independent and parallelizable
decisions.rationale: Phase 41 builds on Stage 1 code (already shipped), Phase 42 touches frontend + subscription read path, Phase 43 is CI-only, Phase 44 adds new tables/Edge Function/admin view -- no shared code paths

decisions.decision: Marketing copy and launch announcement explicitly placed Out of Scope of v1.7
decisions.rationale: Founder-validated approach: prove the four product promises (2-day payouts, honest autopay, 1-click cancel, 20-door focus) BEFORE writing copy that claims them

decisions.decision: v1.6 phase directories deleted (not archived to phases/_archive)
decisions.rationale: Used gsd-tools.cjs phases clear --confirm; the v1.6-ROADMAP.md and v1.6-REQUIREMENTS.md archives in .planning/milestones/ retain the audit trail

decisions.decision: Skipped research step in milestone definition workflow
decisions.rationale: Stages 2-5 are testing/audit/CI/analytics on EXISTING code paths -- no new domain research needed

next_action: Choose either /gsd:plan-phase 41 to plan the first v1.7 phase (Payment Correctness tests) -- or push feat/v1.7-launch-readiness-planning and open a PR if you want milestone planning reviewed independently of PR 589.
